name_cn:

ICARE hobo Nappa lambskin handbag
The highly anticipated croissant-shaped bag🥐 is here. It features a signature metal logo, perfectly combining retro and modern vibes, making it one of the most anticipated It Bags of the season. The classic I CARE shape and distinctive curved logo make it full of fashion sense!
Model: 698652
Size: 44×30×7cm
